The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/Users/shouryakorrapati/Desktop/Cloud_ha.serviceRawFile:
service: library-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  region: ap-south-1

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:*
          Resource: "*"

functions:
  getBooks:
    handler: src/handler.getBooks
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /books
          method: get

  addBook:
    handler: src/handler.addBook
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /books
          method: post

  borrowBook:
    handler: src/handler.borrowBook
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /borrow/{id}
          method: post

  returnBook:
    handler: src/handler.returnBook
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /return/{id}
          method: post

resources:
  Resources:
    BooksTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: Books
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: id
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: id
            KeyType: HASH
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
